author: Dev Pratap Singh
name: SP8192 + Parallel Residuals + Depth Recurrence + LoRA Score-First TTT + Mixed int4/int6/int8 + AWQ
status: unverified - pending 8xH100 reproduction; train_seed*.log files not yet produced
technique_summary: SP8192 + GPT-J parallel residuals + 3x depth recurrence on layers [3,7) + legal score-first LoRA TTT (rank 16) on every block linear + mixed int4-asym/int6/int8 export with AWQ activation-aware scaling + zstd(22) artifact (zlib(9) fallback)

compliance._note: boolean flags are design-level claims (verifiable by reading train_gpt.py); the three null flags are runtime measurements that require the H100 reproduction run. no_pre_quant_ttt refers to the *exported* state_dict — train_main runs an informational score_first_ttt_eval pass after training, but its LoRA adapters are detached/stripped before the saved sd is written, so the artifact has never been TTT-trained.
